channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: OpenAI launches new initiative to help find and patch open-source bugs
item.description: OpenAI is attempting to tackle the security issues of the open source software community.

item.title: How to watch Jordan vs Algeria: Free Streams & TV Channels for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Jordan vs Algeria for free online and from anywhere as both sides battle to keep their FIFA World Cup 2026 hopes alive in Group J.

item.title: The top 5 subscription-free home security cameras, tested and recommended by home tech experts
item.description: These home security cameras will provide protection and peace of mind without tying you into an extra payment plan for storage and advanced features.

item.title: I test vacuums professionally, and I found the 10+ best on sale for Prime Day 2026
item.description: What vacuum should you buy on Prime Day 2026? Our vacuum expert hand-picked these offers — save $100 or more on Shark, Dreame, and Dyson vacuums.

item.title: Nvidia says its AI data center design runs hotter to use a lot less water
item.description: Public pushback against data centers has emphasized their water and energy consumption, and now Nvidia is highlighting its claim that the Rubin generation reference design for a fully liquid-cooled data center has "eliminated massive amounts of power usage and pretty much all water usage." Still, it doesn't address all of the concerns around AI data […]...

item.title: Lego Prime Day deals are already live — 23 deals worth snapping up across Star Wars, Technic, Botanical, and Disney sets
item.description: Amazon’s Lego Prime Day sale is already live, with 23 standout sets across Star Wars, Technic, Botanical, and Disney themes, including fresh price drops and returns to previous lows.

item.title: Our favorite kitchen gadgets are on sale for Prime Day: Get up to 43% off Ninja Slushi, Breville espresso machines, air fryers
item.description: Our shopping team found the best Prime Day kitchen deals of 2026. Save up to 43% on the Ninja Slushi, KitchenAid stand mixers, and air fryers.

item.title: A server within a server: HP packs 81,920 CPU cores, up to 1.28PB RAM into one 42U rack using 80 multi-node motherboards — unannounced Venice is likely to be the fastest x86 CPU ever produced
item.description: HPE demonstrates Cray GX5000 system using AMD Venice processors, delivering 81,920 cores and 1.28PB memory capacity.

item.title: Target Circle Deal Days sale starts June 23: How to make the most of the sale
item.description: Target's anti-Prime Day sale, runs June 23 to 26. Sign-up for Circle membership now to shop the deals.

item.title: Review: The Fitbit Air is the most comfortable fitness tracker I’ve ever worn
item.description: The Fitbit Air is a comfortable fitness tracker that rivals Whoop and is much more affordable.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Tuesday, June 23 (game #1611)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Tuesday, June 23 (game #1108)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Tuesday, June 23 (game #842)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: The top 3 Breville coffee makers I'm looking out for on Amazon Prime Day as a trained barista
item.description: Whether you prefer espresso or drip coffee, there's a Breville coffee maker for you, and I'm expecting some deep Prime Day discounts.

item.title: My favorite gaming laptop deals right now cost less than a Steam Machine — get an RTX 5070, RTX 5060, and more for under $1,000
item.description: It's not all doom and gloom for gamers this week

item.title: Tesla pushes back on Autopilot narrative after fatal Texas crash
item.description: Whether the Autopilot system was truly active, overridden, or malfunctioning likely won't be resolved until investigators finish combing through the vehicle's data logs.

item.title: Best Buy's rival Prime Day sale has unbelievable TV deals that you won't find on Amazon — shop 4K, QLED, and OLED TVs from $99.99
item.description: You can skip Prime Day – Best Buy has launched its rival sale, and its TV deals are incredible, with record-low prices on best-rated 4K, QLED, and OLED TVs.

item.title: Jeux vidéo | Valve lance un PC au prix gonflé par une pénurie de composants
item.description: L’entreprise américaine Valve a lancé lundi son nouveau boîtier de jeux vidéo, baptisé Steam Machine, à plus de mille dollars pièce, un prix justifié par l’explosion du prix de certains composants, en particulier les puces mémoire.

item.title: Hurry, EOFY 2026 sales end in a week — shop these 74 handpicked deals on laptops, phones, appliances and more before June 30
item.description: Don't miss out on these excellent EOFY deals, with some record-low prices on Bose headphones, as well as massive savings on Dyson, Shark, Ninja, Apple and more.

item.title: Shareholders sue Uber’s board over sexual assaults, other incidents
item.description: The lawsuit, led by a Detroit pension fund, alleges Uber's board and management has cut too many compliance corners, resulting in thousands of lawsuits.

item.title: Meta is 'pausing' employee tracking program after it let the whole company see sensitive data
item.description: This won't make the already-controversial AI training endeavor any more popular.

item.title: Autopiloted Tesla reportedly involved in Texas crash that killed a woman
item.description: Authorities are still investigating the deadly crash, but have cited failed autopilot systems in initial statements to the press.

item.title: A Source of Mysterious Repeating Radio Signals From Space Has Been Identified
item.description: Researchers say the discovery could be a “Rosetta stone” for cosmic signals.
